name: UI Component Upgrade
description: Upgrade, refactor, or add new UI components with loading, error, and empty states.
checklist: Add error state with user-friendly message
Ensure all data comes from real API endpoints
Match existing CSS naming convention (e.g. .af-* prefix)
Test with real backend data before marking complete
Check for prop-types or TypeScript type coverage
Verify no broken imports after change
example_tasks: Add loading and error states to RunHistoryPane
Create a new BacklogPane component with item cards
Upgrade the TopBar to show autopilot status
common_failure_modes: Missing empty state causes blank panel
No error boundary leaves users with white screen
CSS class conflict with existing styles
output_format: React JSX component with named export
